node.data: {"M36":{"lit":"հայրապետքն","context":"text/body/ab[100]","n":"հայրապետքն"},"V146":{"lit":"հ<lb xml:id=\"l104309760\" facs=\"#z104309760\" n=\"4\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>այրապետքն","line":{"facs":"#z104309759","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104309759","n":"3"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"20180813_134019 copy"},"n":"հայրապետքն"},"M4287":{"lit":"հայ<lb xml:id=\"l103966803\" facs=\"#z103966803\" n=\"9\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>րապետքն","line":{"facs":"#z103966802","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103966802","n":"8"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"4287.0224a"},"n":"հայրապետքն"}}
